prompt: I have a project with a Postgres database, a Python FastAPI backend in ./api, and a React frontend in ./web. The backend needs DATABASE_URL set and the frontend needs VITE_API_URL. Can you write me an agent-procs.yaml and then start everything up? The backend listens on port 8000 and the frontend on 5173.

assertions.description: YAML defines db, api, and frontend processes
api depends_on db; frontend depends_on api
api has DATABASE_URL, frontend has VITE_API_URL
Each process has a ready field with a sensible pattern
api has cwd ./api, frontend has cwd ./web
Commands use agent-procs up (not individual run commands)
Commands include agent-procs status after startup
